movie.actors: Sean Giambrone, David Milchard, Steve Richmond, Jesse Reid
movie.plot: When a man inherits his grandfather's arena, he and his family try to restore the family wrestling business with the help of a talking monkey, and their star attraction, a wrestling dog.
movie.title: Russell Madness
movie.writer: Aaron Brooks (screenplay), Kirsten Hansen (screenplay), Anna McRoberts (screenplay), Anna McRoberts (story), Robert Vince (screenplay), Robert Vince (story)
